pricing.title: Simple, transparent pricing
pricing.subtitle_line2: Pay only for what you use. No minimum spend, no lock-in.
pricing.free_desc: Perfect for exploration and prototyping your next big idea.
pricing.payg_desc: Full access to all 300+ models with professional features.
pricing.payg_deposit_note: $5 minimum deposit · Unused credits never expire · Refundable within 24 hours
pricing.enterprise_desc: White-glove service for teams that need dedicated infrastructure.
pricing.faq_1_a: You deposit credits into your account and pay per token used. Set up auto top-up to never run out. Platform fee is 4% of each transaction. No minimum spend required.
pricing.faq_2_q: Can I use my own API keys (BYOK)?
pricing.faq_2_a: Yes. Bring your own API keys from OpenAI, Anthropic, Google and others. Pay-as-you-go accounts get 1M free requests/month with BYOK, 4% fee after that.
pricing.faq_3_q: Is the API compatible with OpenAI's SDK?
pricing.faq_3_a: Yes, NexusAI is fully OpenAI-compatible. Just change the base URL and API key — no other code changes needed.
pricing.faq_4_q: What happens if a model provider goes down?
pricing.faq_4_a: We automatically route to backup providers with no interruption. You can also configure your own fallback chain.
pricing.faq_5_q: Do you store my prompts or responses?
pricing.faq_5_a: No. By default we don't store your prompts. You can enable logging in your dashboard for debugging purposes.
pricing.cta_desc: Get instant access to 300+ AI models through a single, unified API.

modelsExplorer.title: Model Explorer
modelsExplorer.subtitle: Compare, filter, and discover the best AI models across providers

modelDetail.providers_routing_desc: NexusAI routes requests to the best providers, with fallbacks to maximize uptime.
modelDetail.pricing_desc: Actual cost per million tokens across providers over the past year
modelDetail.activity_desc: Total usage per day on NexusAI
modelDetail.uptime_desc: Uptime data for {{name}} across all providers. Overall: {{uptime}}%
modelDetail.uptime_error_recovery: When an error occurs in an upstream provider, we can recover by routing to another healthy provider.
modelDetail.sample_code_desc: NexusAI normalizes requests and responses across providers for you.
modelDetail.param_max_tokens_desc: Maximum number of tokens to generate.
modelDetail.param_stop_sequences_desc: Sequences where the model stops generating.
modelDetail.third_party_desc: For information about using third-party SDKs and frameworks with NexusAI, please see our
modelDetail.see_request_docs: See the {{link}} for all possible fields.

rankings.subtitle: Based on real usage data from millions of API requests through NexusAI.
rankings.top_models_desc: Weekly usage of models across NexusAI
rankings.market_share_desc: Compare NexusAI token share by model author

rankings.provider_market_share_desc: Token volume distribution by organizational group.

compare.title: AI Model Comparison
compare.desc_with_model: Compare {{name}} from {{author}} with other AI models on key metrics, including price, context length, and other model features.
compare.desc_default: Compare AI models side by side on key metrics, including price, context length, and model features.

apps.title: Integrate NexusAI, get 10% off
apps.subtitle: Connect NexusAI to your app, get a unique APP Code, and automatically receive 10% off all API calls.
apps.rule_1: Enter your app name and app domain, then click 'Get Code' to generate your unique APP Code.
apps.rule_2_suffix: header to your API requests with your APP Code.
apps.rule_3: All requests with a valid APP Code will automatically receive a 10% discount — no extra steps needed.
apps.rule_4: Each account can register up to 5 apps. APP Codes are bound to domains, so make sure your domain is correct.
apps.registered_successfully: Your app has been registered successfully.
apps.code_saved: Code saved. You can view it in your account settings.
apps.disclaimer: Once registered, all requests made with this APP Code will receive a 10% discount.

docs.quickstart_desc: Make your first API call in minutes. NexusAI is OpenAI-compatible, so you can use your existing SDK and just change the base URL.
docs.openai_compatible_desc: NexusAI supports the OpenAI SDK format. Just change base_url and api_key to access 300+ models.
docs.bento_models_overview_desc: Explore the 300+ available models and pricing.
docs.bento_tool_use_desc: How to connect models to external functions.
docs.bento_authentication_desc: Manage your API keys and security settings.
docs.step_1_desc: To use the API, you'll need an API key. You can create one in the NexusAI Dashboard. Once you have it, set it as an environment variable.
docs.step_2_desc: Choose your preferred language and install the standard OpenAI SDK or use our native packages.
docs.step_3_desc: Initialize the client with our base URL and your key. This example uses Claude 3.5 Sonnet through the NexusAI gateway.
docs.step_4_desc: Our API returns a standard OpenAI-compatible JSON response, enriched with provider-specific metadata in the usage object.
docs.model_id_format_desc: Use provider/model-name format, e.g. openai/gpt-4o or google/gemini-1.5-pro.
docs.next_explore_models_desc: Browse the library of 300+ frontier and open-source models.
docs.next_pricing_guide_desc: Understand our unified token pricing across all providers.
docs.next_sdk_examples_desc: Advanced patterns for streaming, tool use, and vision.
docs.next_join_community_desc: Get help and share your projects on Discord or GitHub.

chat.card_flagship_desc: The most powerful general-purpose intelligence across coding, creative, and logic tasks.
chat.card_roleplay_desc: Tuned for high-fidelity character consistency, narrative depth, and creative worldbuilding.
chat.card_coding_desc: Precision-engineered for complex refactoring, system architecture, and rapid prototyping.
chat.card_reasoning_desc: Extended chain-of-thought capabilities for math, scientific logic, and strategic planning.
chat.disclaimer: NexusAI can make mistakes. Verify important information.

preferences.subtitle: Configure your account settings, notifications, and team access.
preferences.toggle_dark_mode_desc: Use dark theme for the dashboard
preferences.toggle_compact_layout_desc: Reduce spacing in tables and lists
preferences.notif_usage_alerts_desc: Get notified when spending exceeds thresholds
preferences.notif_model_updates_desc: New model releases and deprecation notices
preferences.notif_security_desc: Unusual activity or failed authentication attempts
preferences.notif_marketing_desc: Product tips, case studies, and promotions
preferences.notif_weekly_digest_desc: Summary of usage, costs, and performance metrics

apiKeys.title: API Keys
apiKeys.info_banner: Your default API key has access to all models. Create additional keys for different projects or team members.
apiKeys.copy_now_warning: Copy this key now. You won't be able to see it again.
apiKeys.no_keys_yet: No API keys yet. Create one to get started.

routing.title: Routing
routing.subtitle: Configure model routing rules, fallbacks, and load balancing strategies.
routing.auto_router_desc: Configure which models the Auto Router can route to.
routing.auto_router_body: Route to the best model for each request using
routing.model_patterns_help: Model patterns to filter which models the auto-router can route between. Separate patterns with commas or newlines. Supports wildcards (e.g., "anthropic/*" matches all Anthropic models). Leave empty to use all supported models.
routing.prevent_overrides_tooltip: When enabled, API requests cannot override the auto-router's allowed model list. This ensures all requests go through your configured routing rules.
routing.provider_sort_desc: Choose how providers should be sorted for your requests.
routing.provider_sort_body: Choose how providers should be sorted. Individual requests can override this setting.
routing.provider_sort_default: By default, NexusAI balances low prices with high uptime.
routing.default_model_desc: Set a default model fallback when no model is specified.
routing.default_model_body: Specify which model to use when a request doesn't include a model parameter.

observability.title: Observability
observability.subtitle: Integrate with leading performance monitoring and LLM evaluation tools to track every token, latency, and trace in real-time.
observability.broadcast_desc: Stream your logs and traces automatically to third-party providers. When enabled, every interaction through the gateway is securely dispatched to your active destinations.
observability.privacy_desc: Control what data is sent to this destination.
observability.privacy_mode_desc: When enabled, excludes prompt and completion data from traces.
observability.sampling_desc: Control what percentage of traces are sent to this destination.
observability.rate_tooltip: Value between 0 and 1. For example, 0.5 means 50% of traces will be sent.
observability.api_key_filter_desc: Optionally filter traces by API key.
observability.api_key_filter_tooltip: Only send traces from selected API keys.
observability.filter_rules_desc: Only send traces that match specific criteria.
observability.no_filter_rules: No filter rules configured. All traces will be sent to this destination.
observability.webhook_footer: Looking for a different provider? NexusAI supports custom

presets.title: Presets
presets.subtitle: Create and manage reusable configuration presets for your API requests.

plugins.title: Plugins
plugins.subtitle: Extend your LLM capabilities with modular integrations and specialized tools.
plugins.default_plugin_settings_desc: These settings serve as defaults for all API requests. Individual requests can override these values.
plugins.plugin_web_search_desc: Augment LLM responses with real-time web search results
plugins.plugin_pdf_desc: Parse and extract content from uploaded PDF files
plugins.plugin_response_healing_desc: Automatically fix malformed JSON responses from LLMs
plugins.search_engine_tooltip: Choose which search engine to use for web search queries.
plugins.max_results_help: Maximum number of search results to include (1-20). See docs for default.
plugins.search_prompt_help: Custom prompt injected with search results. Default instructs the model to incorporate results and cite sources using markdown links.
plugins.prevent_overrides_tooltip: When enabled, individual API requests cannot override these default settings.
plugins.domain_filter_desc: Restrict search results to specific domains, or exclude certain domains from results.
plugins.no_domain_filters: No domain filters configured. All domains are allowed.
plugins.max_pages_help: Maximum number of pages to process per PDF file.
plugins.ocr_desc: Enable optical character recognition for scanned documents.
plugins.max_retries_help: Number of attempts to fix malformed JSON before returning an error.
plugins.strict_mode_desc: Require valid JSON schema compliance in addition to syntax.

activity.title: Activity
activity.subtitle: Monitor your model usage, token consumption, and financial spend.
activity.logs_moved: Logs have moved. Your API request logs now have their own

byok.title: BYOK
byok.subtitle: Use your own provider API keys on NexusAI
byok.info_tooltip_1: Using your own key allows you to manage rate limits and expenses directly through your provider account.
byok.info_tooltip_2: The first 1M BYOK requests per-month are free. All subsequent usage is billed at 5% of the upstream provider's cost.
byok.info_tooltip_3: Your keys are always prioritized, with optional fallback to NexusAI credits for increased reliability.
byok.key_tooltip: Your provider API key, encrypted and stored securely.
byok.enabled_tooltip: Toggle to activate or deactivate this key.
byok.always_use_tooltip: Always route requests through your own key.

guardrails.title: Guardrails
guardrails.subtitle: Manage data consent and set spending limits, model restrictions, and usage policies.
guardrails.eligibility_desc: Providers and models available based on your account settings.
guardrails.privacy_desc: Control how your data is used for training and logging purposes.
guardrails.toggle_paid_training: Enable paid endpoints that may train on inputs
guardrails.toggle_paid_training_desc: Control whether to enable paid endpoints that can anonymously use your data for training purposes.
guardrails.toggle_free_training: Enable free endpoints that may train on inputs
guardrails.toggle_free_training_desc: Free model providers often retain and/or train on prompts and completions (applies to both chatroom and API usage). See the model page for details.
guardrails.toggle_free_publish: Enable free endpoints that may publish prompts
guardrails.toggle_free_publish_desc: Allow free model providers to publish your prompts and completions to public datasets.
guardrails.toggle_zdr_desc: When enabled, you will only be able to route to endpoints that have a Zero Data Retention policy.
guardrails.section_providers: Configure which providers can handle your requests.
guardrails.ignored_providers_desc: Exclude these providers from serving any requests.
guardrails.allowed_providers_desc: Exclusively enable these providers for your requests.
guardrails.no_allowed_providers: No providers are specifically allowed. All non-ignored providers are used.
guardrails.always_enforce_desc: When disabled, additional providers can be included on API requests via the {{code}} field. When enabled, only providers explicitly allowed here can be used.
guardrails.provider_warning: NOTE: Ignoring multiple providers, or limiting to specific providers, may reduce fallback options and limit request recovery capabilities.
guardrails.no_guardrails: No additional guardrails. Create one to scope policies to specific keys or members.
guardrails.info_guardrails_1: Guardrails allow setting budgets, privacy, model, and provider restrictions on specific API keys.
guardrails.info_guardrails_2: By default, your global settings apply. Guardrails help to apply further restrictions, at a more granular level.
guardrails.model_eligibility_desc: Providers and models available with this guardrail and your global privacy settings.
guardrails.basic_info_desc: Guardrail name and description for identification and organization.
guardrails.budget_desc: Set a spending limit applied individually to each assigned API key.
guardrails.privacy_new_desc: Privacy and data usage settings. Account-level defaults are inherited unless overridden.
guardrails.toggle_enforce_zdr_desc: Reject requests that cannot be processed without data retention.
guardrails.toggle_paid_train: Paid endpoints that may train on request data
guardrails.toggle_paid_train_desc: Some providers may anonymously use your data for training purposes.
guardrails.toggle_free_train: Free endpoints that may train on request data
guardrails.toggle_free_train_desc: Providers serving free models often retain and/or train on prompts and completions.
guardrails.toggle_free_publish_new: Free endpoints that may publish prompts
guardrails.toggle_free_publish_new_desc: Some free model providers may publish prompts and completions.
guardrails.providers_new_desc: Control which providers are used for routing. Leave empty to allow all.
guardrails.sensitive_info_desc: Automatically detect and handle sensitive information in requests.
guardrails.no_custom_patterns: No patterns configured. Add a regex pattern to redact or block matching content.
guardrails.test_patterns_desc: Enter sample input to preview what the LLM would receive (redaction) or whether the request would be blocked.
guardrails.test_placeholder: e.g., My email is test@example.com and my name is John Smith
guardrails.api_keys_desc: API keys with this guardrail. Organization member guardrails implicitly apply to any API keys that member created.

managementKeys.title: Management Keys
managementKeys.subtitle: Create and manage organization-level keys for programmatic access to account resources.
managementKeys.warning_desc: These keys can manage your entire organization. Store them securely, rotate regularly, and never expose in client-side code.
managementKeys.name_tooltip: A descriptive name to identify this key in your dashboard.
managementKeys.copy_now_warning: Please copy it now and write it down somewhere safe.
managementKeys.cannot_see_again: You will not be able to see it again.
managementKeys.management_key_note: This is a management key. It can only be used to manage other API keys and cannot make model requests.
managementKeys.admin_api_note: You can use it with our admin API endpoints to manage API keys programmatically.
managementKeys.scope_full_access_desc: Create, read, update, delete all resources
managementKeys.scope_billing_only_desc: Access billing and usage data only

valueProps.oneApi_desc: Switch between providers by changing a single line in your config. No refactoring needed.
valueProps.availability_desc: Automatic failover and smart routing ensures your application stays up even if a provider goes down.
valueProps.pricePerformance_desc: Real-time cost optimization and low-latency routing to the best value data centers globally.
valueProps.dataPolicies_desc: Enterprise-grade security with PII stripping, data residency controls, and audit logs.
